CreatedIn: It was created in Las Vegas, Nevada.
It was created in the suburban area of Summerlin, Las Vegas.

It has a second album Pretty. Odd.
It has a third studio album Vices & Virtues.
It has a fourth studio album Too Weird to Live, Too Rare to Die!.
It has a fifth studio album Death of a Bachelor.
It has a sixth studio album Pray for the Wicked.
It has a seventh studio album Viva Las Vengeance.
HasFeatureOf: It is characterized by a sound that marked a significant departure from the band's debut.
It is characterized by a sound that was mostly electronic dance punk in the first half and featured Vaudevillian piano, strings, and accordion in the second half.
InfluencedBy: It was influenced by film scores.
It was influenced by the works of Danny Elfman.
It was influenced by the works of Jon Brion.
IsA: It is an American pop rock band.
It is a solo project of frontman Urie from 2015 until its discontinuation in 2023.
KnownFor: It is known for the single "I Write Sins Not Tragedies".
It is known for the single "High Hopes".
LocatedIn: It is located in Las Vegas, Nevada.
NamedAfter: It is named after a line in Name Taken's song "Panic".

It occurred in 2008.
It occurred in 2009.
It occurred in 2010.
It occurred in 2011.
It occurred in 2012.
It occurred in 2013.
It occurred in 2015.

PartOf: It is part of the band's lineup.

It was produced by Butch Walker.
PublishedAs: It was published as a demo.
It was published as a single.
It was published as an album.

PublishedIn: It was published in the film Jennifer's Body.
UsedIn: It is used in the film Jennifer's Body.
WrittenIn: It was written in Las Vegas.
